name: Shrimp Chips
recipeIngredient: 1 lb shelled shrimp, prawns or lobster
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the shrimp to a paste before adding them to the rest of the ingredients.
2. Dissolve salt and pepper powder in boiling water.
3. Pour the boiling water onto the tapioca flour in a large mixing bowl and stir quickly with a cooking spoon until a dough forms.
4. Add the shrimp paste to the dough and knead until a firm dough is formed.
5. Shape the dough into cylinders about 1 inch in diameter.
6. Place the cylinders on a cheesecloth-lined steamer rack, ensuring they are far enough apart to prevent sticking.
7. Steam at high temperature for 45 minutes, adding water to the steamer as needed.
8. Remove from heat and let cool on a drying rack.
9. Once completely cooled and brittle (1-3 days), cut into thin slices about the thickness of a penny.
10. Store in an airtight container until ready to use.
11. Deep fry at 360°F for a few seconds, increasing in size several times.
12. Drain and serve as garnish or appetizers with crispy fried chicken, duck, etc.
